replacements.description: You have no maximum hand size and don't lose the game for having 0 or less life.

statics.description: You have no maximum hand size and don't lose the game for having 0 or less life.

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, if you cast it, draw five cards.
Whenever you gain life, draw that many cards.
Whenever you lose life, discard that many cards. Then if you have no cards in hand, you lose the game.
